readme.text: You can find the documentation and how to setup ChatRD right here.

speakerbot.title: Speaker.bot
speakerbot.voice_alias_hint: Set in Settings -> Voice Alias on Speaker.bot.
speakerbot.warning_engine: You need to set a Speech Engine and a Voice Alias on Speaker.bot. Follow the tutorial.
speakerbot.warning_websocket: Speaker.bot's WebSocket need to be activated and running. Follow the tutorial.

general.title: Setup
general.skin_beta_warning: ChatRD Skin is in BETA.
general.one_line_hint:
One line chat instead of two in Vertical Chat.
If enabled, it disables the option below.
general.horizontal_hint:
Chat/Events will be horizontal.
If enabled, it disables the option above.
general.group_messages_hint: Consecutive messages from the same user will be grouped.
general.events_dock_hint:
Consecutive events, like Twitch's Hype Trains, Goals and TikTok Joins
will be presented, one at a time, in the dock just below the chat.
general.ignore_chatters_hint: Separate their names by commas. eg.: StreamLabs,StreamElements
general.hide_after_hint: Hides a message after X seconds. (0 disables it)
general.chat_field_hint: Adds a chat field for you to type in your chat.
general.chat_field_warning: The Chat Field also accepts /commands. Commands Supported.
general.embed_image_warning: Be careful when enabling this. Your viewers might post images that are against the platform's Terms of Service and you could face penalties. You have been warned!
general.embedding_roles:
Embedding Permissions
Select which roles would be able to embed images.
general.demo_mode:
Demonstration Mode
Starts ChatRD in test mode, throwing random messages and events.

twitch.title: Twitch
twitch.subscriptions_hint: Shows Sub events. Disabling this disables all sub events.
twitch.gifted_subs_hint: When a user gifts another user a sub.
twitch.gifted_bomb_hint: When a user gifts subs massively.
twitch.gifted_bomb_train: Gifted Bomb Users Train
twitch.gifted_bomb_train_hint: Shows all users that were gifted a sub on a Gifted Bomb.
twitch.seventv_paint_info: The user needs to have a 7TV Sub and Nametag Paint Enabled.
twitch.hype_train_event_hint: Shows when a Hype Train event starts, levels up and ends.
twitch.hype_train_bar_hint: Show the Hype Train Bar under the Statistics.
twitch.goal_event_hint: Shows when a Goal event starts, progress and completes.
twitch.goal_bars_hint: Show a Goal Bar for each goal under the Statistics.
twitch.pronouns_hint: Shows Pronouns to those whom enabled them on Twitch chat.
twitch.embed_images_label:
Twitch Embedded Images
Turn image links into embedded images in ChatRD.

youtube.title: YouTube
youtube.super_sticker_gif: Shows Super Sticker GIF
youtube.memberships_hint: Shows Membership events. Disabling this disables all member events.
youtube.gifted_membership_train_hint: Shows all users that were gifted a membership on a massive gifting membership.
youtube.custom_emotes_hint: You have to add member emotes manually because YouTube's API doesn't relay them to Streamer.bot.
youtube.custom_emote_information: Don't use Discord, Imgur or any temporary image hosting platforms to host your emotes. You could right click on the emote image on YouTube and copy the image URL 😊
youtube.embed_images_label:
YouTube Embedded Images
Turn image links into embedded images in ChatRD.

tiktok.title: TikTok
tiktok.likes_hint: Shows likes in 15 increments. Why? Blame TikFinity! 🤣
tiktok.joins_hint: Shows who joined chat at the bottom of the widget.
tiktok.shares_hint: Shows who shared -or clicks the "Share" button- to the stream.
tiktok.gifts_hint: Shows TikTok Gifts, such as roses, galaxies, etc.
tiktok.small_gifts_hint: Shrinks the size of the gift image to 28px.
tiktok.chat_field_warning: If you have Chat Field enabled, you need to follow the instructions to send messages to TikTok.
tiktok.embed_images_label:
TikTok Embedded Images
Turn image links into embedded images in ChatRD.

kick.title: Kick
kick.api_warning: During peak usage, Kick's API becomes unstable and takes longer to relay events. This is not an issue with Streamer.bot or ChatRD. Kick has "infinite money glitch", so I hope it gets better in the future. 😣
kick.small_kicks_images_hint: Shrinks the size of the gift image to 28px.
kick.subscriptions_hint: Shows Subscription events. Disabling this disables all sub events.
kick.gifted_subs_hint: When a user gifts another user a sub.
kick.gifted_bomb_hint: When a user gifts subs massively.
kick.gifted_bomb_train: Gifted Bomb Users Train
kick.gifted_bomb_train_hint: Shows all users that were gifted a sub on a Gifted Bomb.
kick.embed_images_label:
Kick Embedded Images
Turn image links into embedded images in ChatRD.

streamelements.title: StreamElements
streamelements.setup_warning: You need to connect StreamElements to Streamer.Bot. Follow the tutorial.

streamlabs.title: Streamlabs
streamlabs.setup_warning: You need to connect Streamlabs to Streamer.Bot. Follow the tutorial.

patreon.title: Patreon
patreon.setup_warning: You need to connect Patreon to Streamer.Bot. Follow the tutorial.

tipeee.title: TipeeeStream
tipeee.setup_warning: You need to connect TipeeeStream to Streamer.Bot. Follow the tutorial.

kofi.setup_warning: You need to connect Ko-Fi to Streamer.Bot. Follow the tutorial.

fourthwall.title: Fourthwall
fourthwall.setup_warning: You need to connect Fourthwall to Streamer.Bot. Follow the tutorial.
fourthwall.gift_draw_command_hint: Command used to join the Gift Draw.

modal_add_emote.title: Add YouTube Member Emote
modal_add_emote.image_url_hint: Don't use temporary image domains. Neither Discord linked images.
